comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
@titawens let's say that I assigned you to read and interpret and teach Isaiah 59. where would you start? what would you do?

do you think Yeshua put Isaiah 59 in your path? if the answer is yes, how would you go about even finding out why he put Isaiah 59 in your path? how would you interact with Isaiah 59 if you actually thought Yeshua of Nazareth put this chapter in your path? what would you do with it?

comments.author: titawensi
comments.body:
Still need to think about these questions, but the first thing that comes to mind is to keep listening to it and understand who the chapter is talking to, which I think would require reading Isaiah from the beginning.

Also, I just read chapter 59 and it talks about spider webs, which was an image that I got last night when I was answering Tony's questions at the table, if you remember. So I do believe he did put this chapter on my path.Trying to see it in light of yours and Ellie's encouragement to me yesterday, and I can't quite connect it yet.

I welcome the task and will keep coming back to you and this thread as I go through it!

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
# what can  Isaiah 59 teach people?

what could I use Isaiah chapter 59 to teach people if I had to teach people things from Isaiah 59? what kind of teachings could I bring from Isaiah 59?
